category_sources: source_facts.description identifies an AirTunes emulator with multi-room capability; official GitHub repository describes an AirPlay and AirPlay 2 audio player.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README title and project name use Shairport Sync; source_facts.name is shairport-sync.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README and documents directory contain usage, configuration, and feature documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/mikebrady/shairport-sync, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.executables lists shairport-sync; source_facts.description and official README identify AirTunes/AirPlay audio receiver functionality.
